sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
nodes = current_frame.segmentation['nodes']
white_nodes = [n for n in nodes if n['color'] == 'W']
total_white_pixels = sum(n['pixels'] for n in white_nodes)
print(f"Total white pixels: {total_white_pixels}")
for n in white_nodes:
    print(f"Node ID {n['id']}: pixels={n['pixels']}, boundary={n['boundary']}")
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
